author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Design from mutation inventory (17 non-emitting mutations across mutations.rs/milestones.rs; only locks emit). NEW/EXTENDED EVENT VARIANTS (all serde-additive): CommentAdded (mirrors CommentEntry fields + issue_uuid + comment display_id claimed from counters), TimeEntryAdded (mirrors TimeEntry + entry identity for dedupe), IssueDeleted (tombstone), MilestoneCreated/MilestoneClosed/MilestoneDeleted (mirror milestone file fields + claimed display_id), ScheduleChanged (full-state LWW: issue_uuid + scheduled_at + due_at as post-change values), IssueCreated gains scheduled_at/due_at AND display_id: Option<i64> (the counter-claimed id -- reducer adopts carried ids first-claim-wins by OrderingKey, allocates above frozen max only for None; closes the transition window where event-derived ids could disagree with file-written ids and clobber at materialization). REDUCER: CheckpointState gains milestones map, deleted-issue tombstone set; CompactIssue gains comments + time_entries (idempotent by uuid). Tombstones prevent resurrection by late events. MATERIALIZE: unchanged for comments/time-entries/milestones in this PR (files still written directly by mutations; reducer carries the data so the v3 read path has it; materialization becomes sole writer only at #754 cutover). EMISSION: new shared append_envelope helper centralizing v2 log append + hub_v3 dual-write mirror + shadow stats (moves the PR2 mirror hook so ALL events flow through it); write_commit_push gains event support so each mutation's event lands in the SAME commit as its file write (no second commit/push per op); emit_compact_push refactors onto the helper; all 17 mutations wired. Implementation split: core semantics (events+checkpoint+reducer) first, then emission wiring.
